description: Business intent lifecycle for platform + security audiences (Issue #66). Prometheus panels chart the #62 worker metrics; InfluxDB panels read the #70 posture data. The lineage drill-down shows per-device modeling completeness until the intent schemas enable true forward/reverse lineage.

panels.title: Lineage Coverage
panels.description: Fleet-wide lineage coverage headline (InfluxDB, written hourly by the posture writer). 95% is the LineageCoverageDrop alert threshold.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "compliance")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "compliance_posture_fleet" and r._field == "lineage_coverage_ratio")
  |> last()

panels.title: Binding Failures
panels.description: Intents that failed to bind to device data from Infrahub (24h).

panels.title: Intent Outcomes
panels.description: Connectivity intent deployments by outcome status.

panels.title: Provisioning Duration
panels.description: gNMI SET provisioning latency quantiles from the worker histogram.

panels.title: Decommission Age
panels.description: Age of intents at decommission time. Contract-only metric today — populates when the decommission flow lands.

panels.title: Per-Device Completeness (lineage drill-down)
panels.description: Which devices drag lineage coverage down (latest posture per device). Replaced by true forward/reverse intent lineage once the intent schemas land in Infrahub.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "compliance")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "compliance_posture" and r._field == "completeness")
  |> group(columns: ["device"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["device", "device_group", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])

title: Intent Lifecycle
